tests.title: Fetch and parse a JWK Set
tests.given: A reachable jwks_uri returning a valid JWK Set
tests.then: A typed key set is returned containing all keys

tests.title: Parse required key parameters
tests.given: A JWK Set containing an RSA and an EC signing key
tests.then: Each key exposes kty/kid/use/alg; RSA exposes n/e; EC exposes crv/x/y

tests.title: Resolve key by kid
tests.when: resolve_key(kid) is called with a present kid

tests.title: Key-not-found triggers forced refresh then retry
tests.given: A kid not present in the cached set
tests.then: A forced refresh is performed and resolution retried before a key-not-found error

tests.title: Cache hit within TTL
tests.when: The key set is requested again within the TTL
tests.then: No HTTP request is made and the cached set is returned

tests.title: Force refresh on signature failure
tests.then: The cached set is invalidated and re-fetched from the provider

tests.title: Handle malformed or empty JWKS
tests.given: A jwks_uri returning invalid JSON or an empty key set
tests.then: A descriptive deserialization/validation error is raised
